name: Sovereign Skies
description: Lead the Valkyr Ascendancy to prove that air power alone can win the Cordite Wars. Eight missions across escalating conflict, culminating in the Six Fronts.

missions.name: First Sortie
missions.briefing: A Kragmore mining convoy has encroached on Valkyr territory. Commander Aelara orders a precision strike.

missions.name: Border War
missions.briefing: Kragmore has responded with armoured columns. Hold the frontier using only aerial assets.
missions.twist: Kragmore will push from two directions simultaneously at the 5-minute mark.

missions.name: The Ironmarch Incursion
missions.briefing: Ironmarch engineers are fortifying positions on Valkyr-controlled land. Disrupt their logistics.
objectives: Prevent enemy fortification of the crossroads
missions.twist: Ironmarch FOB trucks must be destroyed before they establish bases.

missions.name: Storm Warning
missions.briefing: Stormrend has entered the war. Their lightning-fast raids are disrupting Valkyr supply lines.
missions.twist: Stormrend will raid supply nodes every 3 minutes.

missions.name: The Naval Threat
missions.briefing: Kragmore dreadnoughts are blockading Valkyr island outposts. The navy must be neutralised.
missions.twist: Valkyr air units can operate over water — use this advantage.

missions.name: Three-Front War
missions.briefing: Valkyr Command is now fighting Kragmore, Ironmarch, AND Stormrend simultaneously.
missions.twist: Enemy factions will periodically call truces to coordinate attacks on Valkyr.

missions.name: The Betrayal
missions.briefing: Intelligence reveals Arcloft has been selling targeting data to all factions. The Arcloft relay tower must be silenced.
objectives: Escape with at least 3 surviving aircraft
missions.twist: Resources are scarce — this is a precision strike, not a war of attrition.

missions.name: The Six Fronts
missions.briefing: All six factions converge on the Cordite Nexus. Valkyr must seize the skies above it and deny all others access.
objectives: Be the last faction standing in the air
missions.twist: All other factions begin in full war with each other — but will unite against whoever controls the Nexus.
